scripts.pretest: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs';import {auditFifteenUnitPublicWorksheetCloseout as a} from './tools/curriculum/audit-15-unit-public-worksheet-closeout.mjs';const r=a();fs.mkdirSync('tmp',{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync('tmp/15-unit-public-worksheet-closeout-report.json',JSON.stringify(r,null,2));console.log('CLOSEOUT_METRICS='+JSON.stringify(r.metrics));console.log('CLOSEOUT_BLOCKERS='+JSON.stringify(r.rows.filter(x=>x.blockers.length).map(({sourceId,blockers})=>({sourceId,blockers}))));"
